channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: The Eternal Life of Goldman coming to Game Pass on day one; Xbox Series demo now available
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Xbox Series

Full game due out in 2026.

Hand-drawn side-scrolling platformer The Eternal Life of Goldman will be available via Game Pass on day one when it launches later in 2026, publisher THQ Nordic and developer Weappy announced. The game is slated for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch, and PC via Steam and Microsoft Store. An Xbox Series demo is available now.

Here are the latest details, via THQ Nordic:

“What a ridiculous old man!” Goldman, hero of the upcoming hand-drawn 2D platforming adventure The Eternal Life of Goldman, has come to save the archipelago and to become the hero that the people there expected the least. While he may not seem like your typical savior-of-the-world type, Goldman has quite a few qualities that make him perfectly suitable for the job.

One might think Goldman can’t defeat anyone with that funny little cane, but please believe us: Yes, he cane! Make sure to check out the latest trailer to see all the unbelievable options this simple cane can give an old man! From jumping to the highest platforms—or onto the heads of his enemies—to hanging onto objects, pulling them, creating a flash of phosphorus, or turning it into a proper shield against enemy attacks: this cane is a powerful weapon in the hands of any old man who knows how to use it.

In the latest trailer, just shown at the Xbox Partner Preview Showcase earlier today, The Eternal Life of Goldman has dropped the big news: Players will be able to play The Eternal Life of Goldman day one with Xbox Game Pass!

And while the Game Pass announcement is already a reason to celebrate, Xbox players have another very good reason to get excited right now: you can check out the demo for The Eternal Life of Goldman on Xbox Series today!

Watch a new trailer below.

Game Pass Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/the-eternal-life-of-goldman-coming-to-game-pass-on-day-one-xbox-series-demo-now-available
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: 17th century Korea-set dark action game MOOSA: Dirty Fate announced for PS5, Xbox Series, and PC
item.content:encoded:
About

“MOOSA” is a Korean word referring to a warrior who has mastered martial arts and chosen the path of the warrior.

In MOOSA: Dirty Fate, warriors driven by different ambitions and convictions collide. Their choices lead to blood—and destiny.

17th Century Joseon, A Land Turned Hell

This is an action game set in 17th century Korea. The 17th century was marked worldwide by the Little Ice Age an era of extreme climate anomalies, great famine, and devastating epidemics.

Korea was no exception. Historical records include the chilling line:

“With nothing left to eat, man ate man.”

Starvation and despair. Corrupt power and a collapsed order. An age that truly resembled hell.

Amid this chaos, you become “Gunn” a warrior who has lost everything to vengeance. You will battle demons disguised as humans and the forces that follow them, while uncovering the truth behind the legendary IMUGI.

Now, only one thing remains to you, Reclaim your life. The only one you can trust is yourself.

Experience 17th Century Joseon Dynasty

Breathtaking mountains and rivers, once-prosperous cities and centers of power, slums shattered by famine and shadowed back alleys.

Each region carries its own atmosphere, combat structure, and story. The world is not merely a backdrop. It is steeped in the lives and despair of those who endured that era. Every step you take becomes part of a legend.

“IMUGI.” Monster? God? or Tragedy?

“Is the Imugi a monster, a god… or another tragedy born of humanity?”

Even within the cruelty of demons lie hidden stories. Conversations with survivors, scattered battlefield records, and the dying words of fallen enemies. Piece by piece, the truth slowly emerges.

Sword and Bow, Your Heart

In the heat of battle, the sword and bow are more than weapons. They are your very heart.

Face overwhelming hordes in large-scale combat, engage in intense one-on-one boss battles against colossal creatures drawn from Korean folklore, and duel master swordsmen in stylish, skill-driven encounters.

MOOSA delivers a diverse and tightly crafted combat experience.

Victory in battle is survival itself the proof of your will.

The bow, in particular, introduces a distinct combat style that sets MOOSA apart from traditional action games. Historically mastered by the Korean people, the bow is reborn here as a strategic weapon capable of turning the tide of battle.

Combat is brutal. Choices are merciless. Only those who survive may write the next chapter.

Watch the announcement trailer below.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/17th-century-korea-set-dark-action-game-moosa-dirty-fate-announced-for-ps5-xbox-series-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Frog Sqwad launches in June for Xbox Series, PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Xbox Series

Slapstick physics-based cooperative extraction puzzle platformer dated.

Slapstick physics-based cooperative extraction puzzle platformer Frog Sqwad will launch for Xbox Series and PC via Steam and Microsoft Store in June, developer Panic Stations announced. It will also be available via Game Pass.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Storm The Sewers for the glory of the Swamp King! Swing, jump, catapult your friends, and eat eat EAT until you grow into a humongous Megafrog. A cooperative extraction puzzle platformer for up to eight players. Squad up with your frog friends for a friendslop party in this slapstick physics adventure!

Team Up With Friends

Join up to seven froggy friends in a physics-based slapstick bonanza. Use your sticky tongue to swing from pipes, solve physics puzzles, drag giant food through winding tunnels and catapult your friends, all for the glory of the ravenous Swamp King!

Find Food

Plunge into ever-changing Sewers full of hazards, weird creatures, creative challenges—and delicious snacks. Chomp down and grow bigger than your teammates. Eat enough and you’ll swell into a round, rolling Megafrog!

…And Don’t Get Eaten

The Swamp King’s hunger grows with each passing day. Spend your well-earned Gold from successful runs on new physics toys and gadgets to give you an edge on future missions. Just make sure to meet your quotas, or you might end up as the Swamp King’s next meal!

Key Features

  • Lick Everything – Use your tongue to lick your friends, swing from pipes, grab physics objects and pull them around, and even catapult things!
  • Extraction Loop – Hop into The Sewers with your frog friends, gather food, and return to The Swamp to feed the Swamp King.
  • Daily Food Quota – Make sure to hit the daily food quota to pass the day and satisfy the Swamp King.
  • Experiment With Physics – Use anything you find in The Sewers to help you solve physics-based puzzles and platforming challenges.
  • Enemies – The Sewers are a strange place, filled with all kinds of unusual creatures – be on the look out!
  • Megafrog – As you eat food, your frog will grow in size. Eat enough food to transform into a MASSIVE Megafrog with a BIG BOOMING VOICE. Roll around The Sewers in style.
  • Frogspawn – If you take damage, you’ll vomit up any food you’ve eaten – take damage on an empty stomach, and you’ll transform into a pathetic frogspawn. You’ll need a friend to help feed you.
  • Voice Chat – Have a laugh with your friends over proximity chat while you play – your frog’s mouth will animate as you talk.

We Think You’ll Love Frog Sqwad If You Enjoy…

RV There Yet?, YAPYAP, PEAK, R.E.P.O., Content Warning, Lethal Company, Fall Guys, and more!

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Window Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/frog-sqwad-launches-in-june-for-xbox-series-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Rebellion Developments announces first-person action horror game Alien Deathstorm for PS5, Xbox Series, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

Due out in 2027.

Rebellion Developments has announced Alien Deathstorm, a first-person action horror game coming to PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam and Microsoft Store in 2027. It will also be available via Game Pass.

Here is an overview of the game, via Rebellion Developments:

Alien Deathstorm is a brand new, raw, visceral first-person action horror game that takes place on a remote off-world colony that is being devastated by a cataclysmic storm and alien creatures.

In Alien Deathstorm, you play as the Combat Engineer, a highly trained first responder, who has been dispatched to a remote, off-world colony that has suffered a complete loss of communications. Arriving days or potentially weeks ahead of a full rescue fleet, your job is to determine what has caused the colony to fall silent and try to save as many lives as possible.

As you land, the Deathstorm is tearing the colony to shreds. You must navigate the ongoing destruction, amid apocalyptic conditions and with the threat of unknown alien horrors. You knew it was going to be bad, but it’s much worse than you thought it would be, and it’s going downhill fast. What you thought was a rescue mission has now become a fight for survival.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/rebellion-developments-announces-first-person-action-horror-game-alien-deathstorm-for-ps5-xbox-series-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Ascend to ZERO launches July 13 for Xbox Series, PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Xbox Series

Time-control roguelike action game dated.

Time-control roguelike action game Ascend to ZERO will launch for Xbox Series and PC via Steam and Microsoft Store on July 13, developer Flyway Games announced. It will also be available via Game Pass.

Here is an overview of the game, via Flyway Games:

About

Have you ever wondered what it’s like to stop the time? Ascend to ZERO is a time-control roguelike, in which you can use your special ability to stop the time itself and efficiently fight your way through the top.

Key Features

  • Time Action – Freeze the time to dodge opponents’ attacks using your unique ability, and always hold a higher ground for the combat. However, don’t forget that the time allowed for you is confined.
  • Infinite Growth – Through the battle, you will get unimaginably stronger in just a matter of seconds. Beware of enemies with higher levels, but when you defeat them, the reward would be tasty.
  • Replayability – Test your skills on every run, and challenge your limits. Find your unique playstyle, and collect Tech Chips to complete your ideal combination.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/ascend-to-zero-launches-july-13-for-xbox-series-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
